case_title: MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL VS HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL AS TO DEFENDANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,515.00, THE COURT GAVE DEFT THE OPPORTUNITY TO PRESENT THE BLUE BOOK VALUE OF PLFT'S CAR SO THAT THE COURT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 22694 ON 3-3-94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HEFFRON, KATHLEEN ROSE RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT MORAN-MUNOZ, LIONEL $1,111.49 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,111.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22694, RECORD TRANSFERRED
